description_long: This is a medium-sized, round-bodied ceramic vase with a single, thick handle attached to its upper section. The vase features a wide, slightly flared mouth and a pronounced, raised neck that transitions smoothly into the body. Its surface is predominantly matte off-white with subtle brownish discoloration near the rim and base, suggesting some age or use. The lower half of the vase is decorated with horizontal, incised lines that add texture and visual interest, while the upper half remains mostly smooth. The handle is robust and ergonomically curved, seamlessly integrated into the body. The overall form is utilitarian yet aesthetically pleasing, suitable for both decorative and functional purposes in an urban environment.
description: A round, off-white ceramic vase with a wide mouth, single thick handle, and incised horizontal lines on the lower body. The surface is matte with subtle brownish discoloration, giving it a slightly aged appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide mouth, thick handle on the right, and incised lines on the lower body.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the full curvature of the handle and the vase's rounded back.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the wide opening, thick rim, and the handle's attachment point.
description_view_3: Back view with the handle mostly hidden, focusing on the smooth, rounded body and incised lines.
